steps.name: Buffer save to file and save primitives
criteria: buffer save_to_file writes content to disk
save-buffer Lisp primitive saves current buffer
Modified flag resets to false after save
Save to nonexistent directory returns error

steps.name: Colon commands for save and open
criteria: Colon w saves current buffer to its file
Colon w filename saves to specified path
Colon e filename opens a new file
Save with no filename shows error message
Open nonexistent file shows error message

steps.name: Vim plugin save and quit bindings
criteria: Normal mode ZZ saves and quits
Unsaved changes warning on quit attempt
